subcomponents.spdxId: LGPL-2.0-or-later AND (Apache-2.0 OR MIT) AND BSD-2-Clause
subcomponents.licenseText:
CAUTION! In a real live JSON import file the license texts only should be added in this field. But we use this field in the Example file also for explanations!

This is an example for a license key combination where you have to choose between the combination of LGPL-2.0-or-later AND Apache-2.0 AND BSD-2-Clause or LGPL-2.0-or-later AND MIT AND BSD-2-Clause

So in the field selectedLicense you must add your decision because the combination of license keys contains an OR in the logic. This means you have to choose.

 In this field for the license texts you nust add the license texts for all 4 licenses.

To follow good praxis:

License text for LGPL-2.0-or-later

AND

License text for Apache-2.0

OR

License text for MIT

AND

License text for BSD-2-Clause.

Means you must add the texts for all 4 licenses in this special case.

The license texts can be devided by AND and OR like in the license expression. So we can better split the text blocks.

For this component the selected licenses in the selectedLicense field are LGPL-2.0-or-later AND Apache-2.0 AND BSD-2-Clause. So MIT is deselected.

See also README.md -> 2.0.0 Multi licensing / Dual licensing

In general this component is modified and is linked dynamic.

subcomponents.spdxId: MIT OR Apache-2.0 OR GPL-2.0-only OR ISC
subcomponents.licenseText:
CAUTION! In a real live JSON import file the license texts only should be added in this field. But we use this field in the Example file also for explanations!

This is an example where you can choose from 4 different licenses but you have to select only one. The license you wnat to use has to be added in the field slectedLicense.

In this field for the license texts you nust add the license texts for all 4 licenses.

To follow good praxis:

License text for MIT

OR

License text for Apache-2.0

OR

License text for GPL-2.0-only

OR

License text for ISC.

Means you must add the texts for all 4 licenses in this special case.

The license texts can be devided by OR like in the license expression. So we can better split the text blocks.

For this component the selected licenses in the selectedLicense field is MIT.

See also README.md -> 2.0.0 Multi licensing / Dual licensing

In general this component is modified and is linked dynamic.

CAUTION! In a real live JSON import file the license texts only should be added in this field. But we use this field in the Example file also for explanations!

This is an example where you can choose between MIT or Apache-2.0 WITH Classpath-exception-2.0 license.

In this field for the license texts you nust add the license texts for all 2 licenses and also the text from the exception.

To follow good praxis:

License text for MIT

OR

License text for Apache-2.0

WITH

Classpath-exception-2.0.

Means you must add 3 text blocks here.

The license texts can be devided by OR and WITH like in the license expression. So we can better split the text blocks.

For this component the selected licenses in the selectedLicense field are Apache-2.0 WITH Classpath-exception-2.0.

See also README.md -> 2.0.0 Multi licensing / Dual licensing

In general this component is modified and is linked dynamic.

So it is a good practise to add the content from a found NOTICE file in the field additionalLicenseInfos.

subcomponents.additionalLicenseInfos:
=========================================================================
==  Example NOTICE file for use with the Apache License, Version 2.0,  ==
==  in this case for the Apache httpd-2.5.0 distribution.              ==
=========================================================================

Apache HTTP Server
Copyright 2016 The Apache Software Foundation.

This product includes software developed at
The Apache Software Foundation (http://www.apache.org/).

Portions of this software were developed at the National Center
for Supercomputing Applications (NCSA) at the University of
Illinois at Urbana-Champaign.

This software contains code derived from the RSA Data Security
Inc. MD5 Message-Digest Algorithm, including various
modifications by Spyglass Inc., Carnegie Mellon University, and
Bell Communications Research, Inc (Bellcore).

CAUTION! In a real live JSON import file the license texts only should be added in this field.

In general this component has no information for modification and linking.

In this case the initial values null for both fields are allowed.

If you have copyleft licenses in your component the two fields modified and linking become mandatory and null is not allowed anymore.

You can find a list with copyleft licenses in the file modifiaction_linking.json.

This component has a transitive dependency, component ex_component_is_a_transitive_dependency with id 10.

That's why the id 10 was added in the field transitiveDependencies.

That is the way to document the dependency tree for a software project.

In general this component has the initial value null for modification and linking because for this spsdx key MIT the information is not mandatory.
